nodes.label: Tests for the multi-board kanban layer (``mangaba kanban boards …``).  Covers th
Isolated MANGABA_HOME with no prior kanban state.      The autouse hermetic conf
The default board's DB lives at ``<root>/kanban.db`` for back-compat.
``MANGABA_KANBAN_DB`` pins the file regardless of board= arg.
kanban_db_path() with no args respects the on-disk pointer.
Ensure the dispatcher pins ``MANGABA_KANBAN_BOARD`` / DB / workspaces on spawn.
Run ``mangaba kanban …`` with PYTHONPATH pinned to the worktree.
